title: Review action should hold CCTV review while CCTV specialist is delayed
description: A live operations review action should still stage CCTV review and keep the command brain composed when the CCTV specialist response is delayed.
author: zaks

specialist.name: cctv
specialist.detail: Live verification queue exceeded the CCTV review SLA.

expectedProjectionChanges.detail: Live verification queue exceeded the CCTV review SLA.

cctv.detail: Live verification queue exceeded the CCTV review SLA.

commandBrainSnapshot.headline: CCTV Review is the next move
commandBrainSnapshot.summary: One next move is staged in CCTV Review.
commandBrainSnapshot.advisory: CCTV specialist is delayed by 45000 ms, so ONYX kept the next move in CCTV Review while fresh verification is pending.
commandBrainSnapshot.rationale: Scenario replay preserved the current gate and staged CCTV Review instead of hanging while cctv specialist delay remained active.
contextHighlights: CCTV specialist delay stayed active at the review gate.
Sequence replay still opened CCTV Review instead of stalling.
missingInfo: Fresh CCTV specialist verification is still pending.
commandBrainSnapshot.followUpPrompt: Confirm whether the CCTV specialist has returned and refresh the live verification feed.

specialistAssessments.summary: CCTV specialist is delayed by 45000 ms, so ONYX is holding the move in CCTV Review until fresh verification lands.
evidence: Deterministic specialist degradation injected at replay step.
Live verification queue exceeded the CCTV review SLA.
missingInfo: Fresh CCTV specialist verification is still pending.

commandBrainTimeline.note: Review evidence staged for INC-DSP-VISUAL while cctv specialist was delayed by 45000 ms.
